run_command:
set -a && [ -f ../../../.env ] && . ../../../.env || true; set +a; if [ -n "${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY"; fi; if [ -n "${OPENROUTER_BASE_URL:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_API_BASE:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_BASE="$OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"; fi; if [ -n "${OPENAI_API_BASE:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_BASE_URL="$OPENAI_API_BASE"; fi; if [ -z "${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}" ] && [ -n "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com/v1; fi; export LONGMEMEVAL_HYPOTHESIS_FILE="/Users/markcastillo/git/eidolon-agent-memory/docs/evals/artifacts/longmemeval_hypothesis.jsonl"; if [ -z "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then echo 'Missing OPENAI_API_KEY/OPENROUTER_API_KEY for LongMemEval run' >&2; exit 2; fi; "/Users/markcastillo/git/eidolon-agent-memory/.venv/bin/python" "/Users/markcastillo/git/eidolon-agent-memory/scripts/evals/mcp_memory_eval.py" longmemeval --data-file data/longmemeval_oracle.json --out-file "$LONGMEMEVAL_HYPOTHESIS_FILE" --mcp-url "http://localhost:3100/mcp" --answer-model "openai/gpt-4.1-mini" --limit 25 && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import os
hyp_raw = os.environ.get('LONGMEMEVAL_HYPOTHESIS_FILE', '').strip()
hyp = Path(hyp_raw) if hyp_raw else None
if hyp is None:
    raise SystemExit('Set LONGMEMEVAL_HYPOTHESIS_FILE to a jsonl file containing question_id and hypothesis fields')
if not hyp.exists():
    raise SystemExit(f'Hypothesis file not found: {hyp}')
PY
cd src/evaluation && ../../.venv-eval/bin/python evaluate_qa.py gpt-4o-mini "$LONGMEMEVAL_HYPOTHESIS_FILE" ../../data/longmemeval_oracle.json && python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
result_path = Path(os.environ['LONGMEMEVAL_HYPOTHESIS_FILE'] + '.eval-results-gpt-4o-mini')
rows = [json.loads(line) for line in result_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if line.strip()]
correct = sum(1 for r in rows if bool(r.get('autoeval_label', {}).get('label')))
total = len(rows)
summary = {'benchmark':'LongMemEval','mode':'official_evaluation_mcp_memory','judge_model': os.environ.get('LONGMEMEVAL_JUDGE_MODEL', 'gpt-4o-mini'),'total':total,'correct':correct,'accuracy':(correct/total if total else 0.0),'hypothesis_file': os.environ['LONGMEMEVAL_HYPOTHESIS_FILE'],'result_file': str(result_path)}
Path("/Users/markcastillo/git/eidolon-agent-memory/docs/evals/artifacts/longmemeval_20260419T154550Z.json").write_text(json.dumps(summary, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
PY
